_meta.description: Sales Director Monthly Review — territory → (director, SOQL filter, PI list view) registry.
_meta.editing_note: Adding a director? Append an entry below. No code change needed for the extract stage. Downstream builders keep a DIRECTORS list that must be updated to match name/territory labels.

UK & Ireland.soql_where: Account_Unit_Group__c = 'SC EMEA' AND Sales_Region__c = 'United Kingdom & Ireland'

Middle East & Africa.soql_where: Account_Unit_Group__c = 'SC EMEA' AND Sales_Region__c = 'Middle East & Africa'

Canada.soql_where: Account_Unit_Group__c = 'SC North America' AND Account.Unit__c = 'SC Canada'

NA Asset Management.soql_where: Account_Unit_Group__c = 'SC North America' AND Account.Unit__c = 'SC USA' AND Account.Industry IN ('Asset Management','Wealth Management')

Pension & Insurance.soql_where: Account_Unit_Group__c = 'SC North America' AND Account.Unit__c = 'SC USA' AND Account.Industry IN ('Pension','Insurance')
